title: Finite SDP Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite SDP bad objective and bad duality-gap QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact SDP replay computes objective 1 and dual objective 1 for a trace-one rank-one primal/dual witness, so the malformed objective 0 row has error 1 and the malformed duality-gap 1/2 row has error 1/2.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional SDP rows only when they add distinct primal/dual slack, complementarity, active-set, or certificate pressure; keep general SDP duality, Slater conditions, and convergence claims in horizon lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite SDP witnesses as deterministic exact-rational replay rows.
Replay matrix symmetry, principal minors, trace constraints, objective values, slack matrices, dual objectives, and primal-dual gaps over exact rationals.
Route false SDP objective and duality-gap claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the offending exact errors.
Keep general SDP weak/strong duality, Slater conditions, KKT sufficiency, and algorithm convergence marked Lean-horizon until proof artifacts exist.
